label: Solo self-hoster
description: One person, your own box, zero external dependencies. OmniStore holds everything; you log in with a username and password.

questions.label: Sign in with an identity provider (Google, Okta…)?
questions.help: The default is a built-in username + password. You can add an IdP later.

notes: The self-hoster on-ramp: OmniStore as the sole system of record (100% of the data), internal auth by default, GTD as the personal methodology.
